reasoning: The Tamil name 'ஜூரோங் கிழக்கு' can be broken down into 'ஜூரோங்' (Jūroṅ) which phonetically resembles 'Jurong', and 'கிழக்கு' (kiḻakku) which directly translates to 'East'. Combining these, it matches 'Jurong East'.
The Tamil name 'அங் மோ கியோ' (Aṅ mo kiyo) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Ang Mo Kio'.
The Tamil name 'அட்மிரல்டி' (Aṭmiraḷṭi) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Admiralty'.
The Tamil name 'ஆர்ச்சர்ட்' (Ārccarṭ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Orchard'.
The Tamil name 'இயூ டீ' (Iyū ṭī) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Yew Tee'.
The Tamil name 'இயோ சூ காங்' (Iyo cū kāṅ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Yio Chu Kang'.
The Tamil name 'உட்லண்ட்ஸ்' (Uṭlanṭs) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Woodlands'.
The Tamil name 'காதிப்' (Kātip) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Khatib'.
The Tamil name 'கிராஞ்சி' (Kirāñci) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Kranji'.
The Tamil name 'சாமர்செட்' (Cāmarceṭ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Somerset'.
The Tamil name 'சுவா சூ காங்' (Cuvā cū kāṅ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Choa Chu Kang'.
The Tamil name 'செம்பாவாங்' (Cempāvāṅ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Sembawang'.
The Tamil name 'டோபி காட்' (Ṭopi kāṭ) phonetically matches 'Dhoby Ghaut'. 'டோபி' sounds like 'Dhoby' and 'காட்' sounds like 'Ghaut'.
The Tamil name 'தோ பாயோ' (To pāyo) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Toa Payoh'.
The Tamil name 'நகர மண்டபம்' (Nagara maṇṭapam) consists of 'நகர' (nagara) which translates to 'City', and 'மண்டபம்' (maṇṭapam) which translates to 'Hall'. Combining these, it matches 'City Hall'.
The Tamil name 'நியூட்டன்' (Niyūṭṭan) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Newton'.
The Tamil name 'நொவீனா' (Novīṉā) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Novena'.
The Tamil name 'பிரேடல்' (Pirēṭal) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Braddell'.
The Tamil name 'பீஷான்' (Pīṣāṉ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Bishan'.

The Tamil name 'புக்கிட் கொம்பாக்' (Pukkiṭ kompāk) consists of 'புக்கிட்' (Pukkiṭ) which phonetically resembles 'Bukit', and 'கொம்பாக்' (kompāk) which phonetically resembles 'Gombak'. Combining these, it matches 'Bukit Gombak'.

The Tamil name 'புக்கிட் பாத்தோக்' (Pukkiṭ pāttok) consists of 'புக்கிட்' (Pukkiṭ) which phonetically resembles 'Bukit', and 'பாத்தோக்' (pāttok) which phonetically resembles 'Batok'. Combining these, it matches 'Bukit Batok'.

The Tamil name 'மரீனா பே' (Marīṉā pē) consists of 'மரீனா' (Marīṉā) which phonetically resembles 'Marina', and 'பே' (pē) which phonetically resembles or directly translates to 'Bay'. Combining these, it matches 'Marina Bay'.
The Tamil name 'மார்சிலிங்' (Mārciliṅ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Marsiling'.
The Tamil name 'யீஷூன்' (Yīṣūṉ) is a direct phonetic transliteration of 'Yishun'.

The Tamil name 'ராஃபிள்ஸ் பிளேஸ்' (Rāffils pilēs) consists of 'ராஃபிள்ஸ்' (Rāffils) which phonetically resembles 'Raffles', and 'பிளேஸ்' (pilēs) which phonetically resembles 'Place'. Combining these, it matches 'Raffles Place'.
